mapper.select:
select * from ( select S.*, rownum rn from ( select * from DAC_ISSUE_DAY_STATISTICS
1=1
and CHECK_TIME >= to_date(#{startTime},'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss')
and CHECK_TIME <= to_date(#{endTime},'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss')
and upper(DATA_NAME_ZH||'.'||DATA_NAME_EN) like #{searchContent}
and UPDATE_RESULT = #{isExceptionJob}
and UPDATE_RESULT = #{updateResult}
and IS_PARTITION = #{isPartition}
and (ACCEPT_CITY = #{acceptCity} or ACCEPT_CITY = #{local})
AND ACCEPT_CITY = #{acceptCity}
and TASK_STATE = #{taskState}
and BASE_TIME_ENABLE = #{isBaseJob}
order by
CHECK_TIME ${sortType}, ID DESC
DATA_NAME_ZH ${sortType}, ID DESC
DATA_NAME_EN ${sortType}, ID DESC
IS_PARTITION ${sortType}, ID DESC
ACCEPT_CITY ${sortType},ID DESC
EXCHANGE_POSITION ${sortType}, ID DESC
SOURCE_COUNT ${sortType}, ID DESC
PROVIDER_READ_COUNT ${sortType}, ID DESC
PROVIDER_WRITE_COUNT ${sortType}, ID DESC
ACCEPTOR_READ_COUNT ${sortType}, ID DESC
ACCEPTOR_WRITE_COUNT ${sortType}, ID DESC
DEST_COUNT ${sortType}, ID DESC
COURSE_CHAIN_RATIO ${sortType}, ID DESC
HISTORICAL_COMPARISON ${sortType}, ID DESC
PROVIDER_START_TIME ${sortType}, ID DESC
PROVIDER_END_TIME ${sortType}, ID DESC
ACCEPTOR_START_TIME ${sortType}, ID DESC
ACCEPTOR_END_TIME ${sortType}, ID DESC
BASE_TIME ${sortType}, ID DESC
PROVIDER_DURATION ${sortType}, ID DESC
ACCEPTOR_DURATION ${sortType}, ID DESC
ALL_DURATION ${sortType}, ID DESC
) S where rownum <= #{pageSize} ) where rn > #{pageNum}
select JOB_ID jobId, DATA_NAME_EN dataNameEn, BASE_TIME baseTime, BASE_TIME_ENABLE baseTimeEnable from DAC_ISSUE_BASE_TIME
mapper.insert: insert into DAC_ISSUE_BASE_TIME(JOB_ID, DATA_NAME_EN, BASE_TIME, BASE_TIME_ENABLE) values (#{jobId}, #{dataNameEn}, #{baseTime}, #{baseTimeEnable})
mapper.update: update DAC_ISSUE_BASE_TIME set BASE_TIME=#{baseTime}, BASE_TIME_ENABLE=#{baseTimeEnable} where JOB_ID=#{jobId} and DATA_NAME_EN=#{dataNameEn}
mapper.delete: delete from DAC_ISSUE_BASE_TIME where JOB_ID=#{jobId} and DATA_NAME_EN=#{dataNameEn}
mapper.select: SELECT SUM(SJTS) dataCount, SJJSWZ_JYQK sourceLocation, SJTGF_DZDBH billNo, MAX(JOB_ID) jobId, STRING_AGG(BATCH_ID, ',') as batchId FROM DAC_ISSUE_PROVIDER_BILL WHERE SCSJ_RQSJ >= #{startDate} and SCSJ_RQSJ <= #{endDate} GROUP BY SJJSWZ_JYQK, SJTGF_DZDBH

SELECT SUM(SJTS) dataCount, SJJSWZ_JYQK sourceLocation, SJJRF_DZDBH billNo, MAX(JOB_ID) jobId, STRING_AGG(BATCH_ID, ',') as batchId, MAX(SJTGF_DZDBH) providerBillNo FROM DAC_ISSUE_ACCEPTOR_BILL WHERE SCSJ_RQSJ >= #{startDate} and SCSJ_RQSJ <= #{endDate} GROUP BY SJJSWZ_JYQK, SJJRF_DZDBH

SELECT SUM(SJTS) dataCount, SJJSWZ_JYQK sourceLocation, SJTGF_DZDBH billNo, MAX(JOB_ID) jobId, STRING_AGG(BATCH_ID, ',') as batchId FROM DAC_ACCESS_PROVIDER_BILL WHERE SCSJ_RQSJ >= #{startDate} and SCSJ_RQSJ <= #{endDate} GROUP BY SJJSWZ_JYQK, SJTGF_DZDBH

SELECT SUM(SJTS) dataCount, SJJSWZ_JYQK sourceLocation, SJJRF_DZDBH billNo, MAX(JOB_ID) jobId, STRING_AGG(BATCH_ID, ',') as batchId, MAX(SJTGF_DZDBH) providerBillNo FROM DAC_ACCESS_ACCEPTOR_BILL WHERE SCSJ_RQSJ >= #{startDate} and SCSJ_RQSJ <= #{endDate} GROUP BY SJJSWZ_JYQK, SJJRF_DZDBH

SELECT JOBID jobId,ID batchID,STATUS status,STARTTIME dataStartTime,ENDTIME dataEndTime,CREATETIME createTime FROM DI_JOB_BATCH_RECORD WHERE 1 = 1
and CREATETIME > to_date(#{tag},'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss')
select JOB_ID AS jobId, BATCH_ID AS batchId, STATUS, DATA_START_TIME AS dataStartTime, DATA_END_TIME AS dataEndTime, CREATE_TIME AS createTime, LOCAL from DAC_RELATE_JOB
select TAG from DAC_RELATE_TAG WHERE TYPE = 1

-- DAC_ISSUE_PROVIDER_BILL 表中没有 INCEPT_DATA_TIME 这个字段? select max(a) - min(a) unReconCount from ( select COUNT( DISTINCT INCEPT_DATA_TIME) a from DAC_ISSUE_PROVIDER_BILL WHERE CREATE_TIME >= to_date(#{startDate},'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss') and CREATE_TIME <= to_date(#{endDate},'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss') union all select COUNT(DISTINCT INCEPT_DATA_TIME) a from DAC_ISSUE_ACCEPTOR_BILL WHERE CREATE_TIME >= to_date(#{startDate},'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss') and CREATE_TIME <= to_date(#{endDate},'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss') union all select COUNT(DISTINCT INCEPT_DATA_TIME) a from DAC_ACCESS_PROVIDER_BILL WHERE CREATE_TIME >= to_date(#{startDate},'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss') and CREATE_TIME <= to_date(#{endDate},'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss') union all select COUNT(DISTINCT INCEPT_DATA_TIME) a from DAC_ACCESS_ACCEPTOR_BILL WHERE CREATE_TIME >= to_date(#{startDate},'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss') and CREATE_TIME <= to_date(#{endDate},'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss') )
select count(distinct JOB_ID) dataTypeCount from DAC_ISSUE_DAY_STATISTICS

select sum(case when UPDATE_RESULT = 0 then 1 else 0 end) failedCount, sum(case when UPDATE_RESULT = 1 then 1 else 0 end) successCount from DAC_ISSUE_DAY_STATISTICS WHERE CHECK_TIME >= to_date(#{startDate},'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss') and CHECK_TIME <= to_date(#{endDate},'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss')

select CHECK_TIME issueTime, sum(DEST_COUNT) issueCount from DAC_ISSUE_DAY_STATISTICS WHERE CHECK_TIME >= to_date(#{startDate},'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss') and CHECK_TIME <= to_date(#{endDate},'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss') GROUP BY CHECK_TIME
